name: Pecan Tassies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Mix together the butter and cream cheese in a small bowl or food processor.
3. Add the flour and blend thoroughly.
4. Divide into 30 balls and shape.
5. Wrap all 30 balls in plastic wrap and chill slightly.
6. Place each ball in an ungreased fluted tart pan or muffin cup.
7. Press the dough against the bottoms and sides of the pans with your fingertips.
8. For the filling, place half the pecans in the dough-lined pans.
9. Beat together the egg, sugar, butter, vanilla, and salt until all lumps are gone.
10. Pour the egg mixture over the pecan-topped dough.
11. Dot with the remaining pecans.
12. Bake for 25 minutes or until the filling is set.
13. Cool for 5 minutes on a rack before removing from the pans. The caramel will set as it cools.
14. These tiny tarts freeze easily.
